summary: INCOMPLETE DELIVERY. Unpinned GitHub Action (semantic-version-bumper.yml:10, `uses: actions/checkout@v4` must be pinned to SHA). Workflow missing required test harness: no fixture setup, no multi-case testing through act, no act-result.txt artifact (task mandates "ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT" + artifact required). Task requires TDD test file (start with failing test) but none provided. Script itself is well-written (good TypeScript, solid logic, testable) but workflow doesn't execute tests with varied inputs nor verify outputs. Workflow assumes commits.txt exists without creating it. Would not ship without: pinning action, implementing fixture-driven test loop in workflow, producing act-result.txt with validation assertions, adding test file with TDD approach.
